:"0xe2e337e6dde9ef6b680e07338c493ebea1b5fd09b43424112868e9cc1706bca7","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://6df0ddf21ce9f58271bdfaa85cde98b200ef242a05a3f85c2bc10a8294800a92","dweb:/ipfs/QmRK2Y5Yc6BK7tGKkgsgn3aJEQGi5aakeSPZvS65PV8Xp3"]}},"version":1}

constructor.details: Reverts if either address is zero.

deposit(address,uint256).details: Reverts if paused, amount is zero, vault is not set, or token is not supported. Emits Deposit event.

pause().details: Only callable by ROUTER_ADMIN_ROLE. Inherits from Pausable.

paused().details: Returns true if the contract is paused, and false otherwise.

setVault(address).details: Only callable by ROUTER_ADMIN_ROLE. Emits VaultSet event on success.

params._vault: The new vault address to set.

unpause().details: Only callable by ROUTER_ADMIN_ROLE. Inherits from Pausable.

withdraw(address,address,uint256).details: Only callable by OPERATOR_ROLE. Reverts if paused, amount is zero, vault is not set, or token is not supported. Emits Withdrawal event.

params.recipient: The address to receive the funds.

SET_VAULT().notice: Constant for the SET_VAULT action identifier used in timelock proposals.

constructor.notice: Initializes the contract with RoleManager and Timelock addresses.

deposit(address,uint256).notice: Deposits tokens or ETH into the vault.

roleManager().notice: Address of the RoleManager contract for access control.

setVault(address).notice: Executes the setting of a new vault address after timelock validation.

timelock().notice: Address of the Timelock contract for delayed execution of sensitive operations.

vault().notice: Address of the Vault contract where funds are routed.

withdraw(address,address,uint256).notice: Withdraws tokens or ETH from the vault.
